scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web,tunnel -c blue,green,magenta "PORT=${API_PORT:-4100} API_ORIGIN=${API_ORIGIN:-https://api.celeris.pro} CELERIS_HOSTED_AUTH_ORIGIN=${CELERIS_HOSTED_AUTH_ORIGIN:-https://auth.celeris.pro} CELERIS_APP_ENCRYPTION_KEY=${CELERIS_APP_ENCRYPTION_KEY:-development-celeris-app-encryption-key} npm run dev --workspace @celeris/api" "PORT=${WEB_PORT:-3101} NEXT_PUBLIC_API_ORIGIN=${NEXT_PUBLIC_API_ORIGIN:-https://api.celeris.pro} NEXT_PUBLIC_HOSTED_AUTH_ORIGIN=${NEXT_PUBLIC_HOSTED_AUTH_ORIGIN:-https://auth.celeris.pro} npm run dev --workspace @celeris/web" "npm run dev:tunnel"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @celeris/shared && npm run build --workspace @celeris/db && npm run build --workspace @celeris/sdk-browser && npm run build --workspace @celeris/sdk-server && npm run build --workspace @celeris/api && npm run build --workspace @celeris/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @celeris/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @celeris/db && npm run typecheck --workspace @celeris/sdk-browser && npm run typecheck --workspace @celeris/sdk-server && npm run typecheck --workspace @celeris/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @celeris/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @celeris/shared && npm run test --workspace @celeris/api && npm run test --workspace @celeris/web
